game_name: King's Quest VI: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow
extraction_notes: The Wikipedia source provided does not contain documented information about music tempo, keys, chord progressions, SFX characteristics, or area-specific audio data. Only composer name (Chris Braymen) was extractable from available documentation. Game includes multiple themed islands (Isle of the Crown with Arabian Nights theme, Isle of Wonder with Alice in Wonderland inspiration, Isle of the Sacred Mountain with Classical mythology inspiration, Isle of the Beast with Beauty and the Beast inspiration), but no audio parameters for these areas are documented in the provided source.
